name: Bravehearts
overview: Bravehearts is India's first Army anthology series dedicated to the humans behind the heroes in our Army. The series explores 5 unique stories of hope, courage, sacrifice, and pride for our nation.

trailers.title: Dice Media | Bravehearts | Web Series | Official Trailer | Ft Aadhya Anand, Shakti Kapoor, Anup Soni
